Commands for managing environment variables (secrets) stored
in a CircleCI context.

Variable values are never returned by the API — only names are
readable. Use 'set' to create or update a variable.

Usage:
  context secret [command]

Available Commands:
  remove      Remove an environment variable from a context
  set         Set an environment variable in a context

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for secret

Use "context secret [command] --help" for more information about a command.
